mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO query_metrics_raw ( database_id, instance_id, collected_at, query_id, query_hash, query_text, short_query, query_type, execution_count, io_blocks, planning_time_ms, execution_time_ms, cpu_usage_percent, memory_usage_mb, username, application_name, client_addr, state, created_at ) VALUES
(#{m.databaseId}, #{m.instanceId}, #{m.collectedAt}, #{m.queryId}, #{m.queryHash}, #{m.queryText}, #{m.shortQuery}, #{m.queryType}, #{m.executionCount}, #{m.ioBlocks}, #{m.planningTimeMs}, #{m.executionTimeMs}, #{m.cpuUsagePercent}, #{m.memoryUsageMb}, #{m.username}, #{m.applicationName}, #{m.clientAddr}, #{m.state}, NOW())
